metadata.title: Ankhnii Nakhia | Pharmacy & Pharmaceutical Supplier
metadata.description: Ankhnii Nakhia LLC - A company operating in pharmaceuticals and foreign trade since 2007. 6 branch pharmacies, pharmaceutical supply services. Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia.

hero.description: Ankhnii Nakhia LLC has been operating in pharmaceuticals and foreign trade since 2007, serving family clinics and citizens with safe, quality medicines through 6 branch pharmacies and pharmaceutical supply services.

experience.label: Years of Experience
experience.desc: Continuously serving the healthcare sector since 2000

branches.label: Branch Pharmacies
branches.desc: Serving citizens across 6 branch pharmacies in Ulaanbaatar

staff.label: Professionals & Staff
staff.desc: Staffed with pharmacists, dispensers, and qualified professionals

products.title: Branch Network
products.subtitle: Serving citizens through 6 branch pharmacies and a pharmaceutical supply unit

services.title: Business Directions
services.subtitle: Operating pharmacy networks, pharmaceutical supply, and import activities in compliance with regulations.

pharmacyNetwork.title: Pharmacy Network
pharmacyNetwork.desc: Since 2009, serving family clinics and citizens with safe, quality medicines at Health Insurance discounted prices across 6 branch pharmacies.

supplyService.title: Pharmaceutical Supply
supplyService.desc: Since 2017, supplying medicines, medical instruments, equipment, and accessories under special license.

import.title: Medicine Import
import.desc: Importing over 10 types of medicines registered in Mongolia's pharmaceutical registry from reputable manufacturers in Russia and Vietnam.

quality.title: Quality Standards
quality.desc: Following the MNS5260:2015 standard, serving with medicines registered in Mongolia's pharmaceutical registry that meet safety and quality requirements.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: We uphold the following values as the core principles of our operations.

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: Supplying products that meet international GMP standards and prioritizing quality assurance.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.desc: Operating continuously for over 25 years since 2000, serving citizens through 6 branch pharmacies.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.desc: Strictly adhering to healthcare sector standards and conducting responsible operations.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: Implementing modern technology and innovative solutions to continuously improve our services.

ctaBanner.title: Partner with Us
ctaBanner.description: Contact us if you would like to place an order for medicines and medical supplies or learn about partnership opportunities.

footer.companyDesc: Operating in pharmaceuticals and foreign trade since 2007, serving citizens with quality medicines across 6 branch pharmacies.
footer.copyright: © 2007–2026 Ankhnii Nakhia LLC. All rights reserved.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Contact us for detailed product information or to place an order.

about.heroDescription: Ankhnii Nakhia LLC was established in 2007 in pharmaceuticals, foreign trade, and agriculture, and today operates with 6 branch pharmacies and a pharmaceutical supply unit.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To provide safe, quality-assured medicines and medical supplies to healthcare organizations and the public continuously and equitably, delivering pharmaceutical care services.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To supply quality medicines and medical equipment from highly developed countries including Austria, Germany, Poland, USA, Australia, and South Korea.

history.title: Our Story
history.p1: Ankhnii Nakhia LLC was established in 2007 as a sole proprietorship in pharmaceuticals, foreign trade, and agriculture. Founding director Kh. Sarnai is a qualified pharmacist with over 20 years of professional experience.
history.p2: Under a special license from the Capital City Health Department, "Ankhnii Nakhia" pharmacy opened in November 2009 and has since expanded to 6 branch pharmacies with over 30 employees. Serving at Health Insurance discounted prices, we provide safe, quality medicines to family clinics and citizens.
history.p3: Since 2017, operating under a special license for pharmaceutical and medical equipment supply in Khan-Uul District, importing over 10 types of medicines from reputable manufacturers in Russia and Vietnam.

standard.title: MNS5260:2015 Standard
standard.desc: Operating in compliance with the pharmacy structure and operations standard.

sixBranches.title: 6 Branch Pharmacies
sixBranches.desc: Including Azyn Nakhia-1, Azyn Nakhia-2, Shine Nakhia, and Az Children's Hospital branches.

team.title: Professional Team
team.desc: Over 30 professionals and staff including pharmacists and dispensers.

insurance.title: Insurance Discount
insurance.desc: Serving citizens at Health Insurance discounted prices.

timeline.title: Our Growth Journey
timeline.y2000: Operations began, taking the first steps in the healthcare sector.
timeline.y2007: Ankhnii Nakhia LLC was established in pharmaceuticals, foreign trade, and agriculture.
timeline.y2009: "Ankhnii Nakhia" pharmacy opened with a special license from the Capital City Health Department.
timeline.y2017: Received special license for pharmaceutical and medical equipment supply.
timeline.y2020: Expanded to 6 branch pharmacies with over 30 employees.
timeline.y2024: Importing 10+ types of medicines from Russia and Vietnam, with plans to expand to Europe and the USA.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: We uphold the following values as the core principles of our operations.

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: Following the MNS5260:2015 standard, serving with medicines registered in Mongolia's pharmaceutical registry that meet safety and quality requirements.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.desc: Operating continuously for over 25 years since 2000, serving citizens through 6 branch pharmacies.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.desc: Fully implementing laws and regulations in our operations, working responsibly.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.desc: Serving at Health Insurance discounted prices and promoting rational medicine use.

cta.title: Partner with Us

hr.heroDescription: We create a positive work environment, professional growth, and sustainable development for every employee together.

policy.title: HR Policy
policy.subtitle: We develop our employees and create a favorable environment to maximize their capabilities. Through professional training and skills programs, we support the growth and development of each employee, contributing to the organization's sustainable development.

rightFit.title: Right Job Placement
rightFit.desc: Placing each employee in a position that matches their skills, interests, and talents, creating conditions for productive and highly effective work.

fairEvaluation.title: Fair Evaluation
fairEvaluation.desc: Clearly distributing responsibilities and implementing an objective, fair evaluation system.

resultBasedReward.title: Results-Based Incentives
resultBasedReward.desc: Genuinely valuing the worth of labor and creating conditions for long-term, stable, and active work.

continuousGrowth.title: Continuous Development
continuousGrowth.desc: Implementing training programs to systematically improve professional and general skills.

teamCulture.title: Positive Team Culture
teamCulture.desc: Creating an organizational culture that values respect, understanding, and a creative atmosphere.

recruitment.title: Recruitment Process
recruitment.subtitle: Our hiring process is based on transparent and fair principles.

jobPosting.title: Job Posting
jobPosting.desc: Publishing job vacancy announcements seeking qualified professionals.

screening.title: Application Screening
screening.desc: Checking whether candidates meet the set requirements.

initialInterview.title: Initial Interview
initialInterview.desc: Conducting interviews to assess skills and fit.

followUpInterview.title: Follow-up Interview
followUpInterview.desc: Meeting with management for detailed position assessment.

hiring.title: Hiring
hiring.desc: Signing the contract and starting the team onboarding process.
